overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a winding dirt trail through grassy prairie. The scene begins with snow-capped mountains visible ahead and gradually reveals a large mountain lake as the character progresses along the hillside path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with mountain backdrop

events.description: character raises right hand to briefly touch and adjust hat while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: cowboy walking steadily along dirt path through tall grass toward distant snow-capped mountains

entered.detail: distant mountain range with snow visible on peaks against the horizon
winding dirt path cutting through the tall grass prairie
tall green and yellow grass flanking both sides of the trail
tall green and yellow grass flanking both sides of the trail
low shrubs and scrub vegetation scattered across the prairie landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie landscape with a cowboy walking along a dirt trail toward distant snow-capped mountains. Tall grass flanks the path on both sides with scattered scrub vegetation. Around the 18-second mark, the character briefly touches his hat while maintaining his forward walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding prairie trail through rolling grassland

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as it curves gently to the right through denser vegetation patches

entered.detail: thicker clusters of bushes and vegetation on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail curves gently through rolling grassland with the snow-capped mountains shifting to the right side of the frame. The vegetation becomes slightly denser with thicker shrubbery appearing on the right. The character maintains a steady walking pace along the winding dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside trail overlooking mountain lake vista

events.description: large mountain lake comes into view on the left as the trail descends slightly

agents.ego_description: walking steadily downhill toward the lake vista, maintaining consistent pace along the trail

entered.detail: large body of water with small islands visible in the distance below the trail
dense tree line marking the distant shoreline of the lake

segments.scene_description: As the trail descends slightly, a stunning mountain lake vista opens up on the left side of the frame, revealing a large body of water with forested shorelines and islands. The snow-capped mountains now frame the center background behind the lake. The character continues walking steadily along the path as the scenery transitions from inland prairie to lakeside overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a wide prairie that gradually reveals a breathtaking mountain lake vista. It begins with a cowboy walking along a dirt trail flanked by tall grass and scrub vegetation, heading toward distant snow-capped mountains. As the trail curves through the rolling grassland, the mountains shift to the right and the shrubbery becomes denser along the path. The scene then opens up as the trail descends, shifting from an inland prairie to a lakeside overlook where a large body of water with forested shorelines and islands appears on the left. Finally, the character continues his steady pace as the snow-capped peaks move to frame the center background behind the expansive lake.
